title: White Silver Snowflake Christmas Balloons, 18 Inch White Snowflake Foil Balloon with Metallic Silver Explosion Star Mylar Balloon for Xmas Ice Snow Winter Holiday Onederland Birthday Party Decorations
features: Snowflake Christmas Balloons Package Includes: Our metallic silver white latex balloons kit features a stunning combination of 1 pcs 22" silver explosion star foil balloon, 1 pcs 18" 3D white snowflake mylar balloon, 5 pcs 12" clear print snowflake latex balloons, 15 pcs 12" matte white balloons, 15 pcs 12" metallic silver balloons and balloon ribbon to help you create stunning, reusable decorations

For Any Event: Featuring an impressive color palette of chrome silver white balloons and snowflake balloons, these winter theme balloons kits are ideal for creating a festive atmosphere on Xmas party decorations, winter baby shower party, winter wonderland theme birthday, wedding

Easy Setup: Enjoy DIY fun—inflate the balloons, attach them to the included ribbon tape, trim to your desired length, and arrange in any shape. Hang them on trees, walls, windows, doors, tables, or anywhere you like for a festive touch

Safe to Use: Made from non-toxic latex, these balloons are safe for use around children. The thicker latex material helps prevent popping, so they maintain their shape and appearance throughout your event
Tips: Balloons should always be used under adult supervision to ensure children's safety. To keep the balloons intact, avoid over-inflating them and protect them from direct sunlight or sharp objects
